title: YUET 2 Pcs Bathroom Towel Hook Self Adhesive,Stick on Metal Coat Hooks Robe Hook SUS 304 Stainless Steel Heavy Duty Door Hanger Clothes Closet Sponges Holder No Drill for Bathroom Hotel (White)
features: SELF ADHESIVE HOOKS: Heavy duty sticky hooks, the back of the hook has super viscosity. No drilling is required, the wall will not be damaged, reducing your trouble. Suitable for smooth surfaces, such as PVC, marble, metal, smooth tiles, wood, glass, etc

EASY TO INSTALL: Please wipe the wall to keep clean and dry before installation, then peel off film of adhesive tabs and stick it on the wall, press hard for a few seconds. 24 hours later to use the adhesive hooks, it will work better

MATERIAL: High quality 304 stainless steel towel hooks, anti-rust shower hooks. Strong metal wall hooks, durable. Round design, suitable for modern kitchen, bathroom, toilet, bedroom, office, library, living room, garage, etc

SIZE & COLOR: Approximately 2 x 2 inches of these removable wall hooks. These punch free hooks available in luxurious brushed gold, classic matte black, noble brushed nickel, fantastic polished chrome, romantic brushed rose gold, pure white. Each color is very beautiful, you can choose any color you like
YOU WILL GET: 2 pieces self adhesive hooks. These decorative wall hooks are suitable for hanging coats, towels, keys, robes, hats, bags, backpack, umbrella, cleaning brush, etc
description: Product Description YUET Adhesive Hooks 304 Stainless Steel Robe Hook Holder Heavy Coats Easy to Install Strong Load-Bearing Storage Helper Application Surfaces Rustproof Easy to install Easy to install - there is a 3M sticker on the hook, which can be quickly installed without drilling holes and will not damage the wall. Waterproof and rust proof - SUS304 stainless steel structure, ensuring quality, lifespan, and durability. Real materials Real material adhesive bathroom towel hook Widely used Widely used - for towel hooks, coat hooks, self-adhesive hooks, kitchen hooks, curtain hooks, etc. in bathrooms. Waterproof and moisture-proof, non rusting. Waterproof Easily cope with damp environments such as bathrooms and toilets. Even if it gets wet, it won't fall off Strong load-bearing towel hook Sturdy hook.
